Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 581

COMM669 Professional Practice Forum in Translation: Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Provides opportunities to complete real-world translation projects

on campus and in the public service, legal, business, and political communities as translators, project managers and translators/reviewers working on group projects. Collaboration with participants in the interpreting practicum is also sought to prepare multilingual texts

for practicum events and familiarize participants with conference translation. Complements Translation for Specific Markets, and practicum projects are included in course and career reflective practice portfolios. Requires independent study plan agreed with course instructor.
